tagline: Honest and Affordable Professional Swimming Pool Cleaning and Maintenance

hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves Family Care
hero.subheadline: A&C Pools has served Frisco and North Texas families for over 11 years with personalized, reliable pool maintenance. We treat every customer like family — because that's exactly what we are.
checkmarks: Weekly typed inspection reports after every visit

services.headline: Complete Pool Care Solutions
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to equipment repairs, our certified technicians keep your pool sparkling year-round.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Vacuuming, brushing, chemical balancing, and a typed inspection report emailed to you after every single visit.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of heaters, filters, pumps, and automatic cleaners to keep your pool running efficiently.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning
cards.description: Professional deep cleaning to restore optimal water flow and extend the life of your filtration system.

cards.title: Control System Installation
cards.description: Automated pool and spa control systems for convenient one-touch management of your pool's daily operation.

cards.title: Pool Light Services
cards.description: Installation and repair of pool lighting for enhanced safety and beautiful ambiance during evening swims.

cards.title: Deck-O-Seal & Coping
cards.description: Specialized coping seal and Deck-O-Seal services to protect your pool deck from water intrusion and cracking.

steps.title: Schedule Your Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out our form and we'll arrange a convenient time to inspect your pool — completely free.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: We'll evaluate your pool's condition and recommend the right service plan tailored to your needs and budget.

steps.title: Enjoy a Sparkling Pool
steps.description: Relax while our certified techs keep your pool pristine, with detailed reports after every visit so you're always informed.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 2015
about.headline: We Treat Your Pool Like It's Our Own
about.description: Founded by Christy C. Johnson in 2015, A&C Pools was built on a simple promise: provide honest, affordable pool care with the kind of personal attention only a family business can deliver. Over the past 11 years, we've earned the trust of hundreds of North Texas families through consistent quality, transparent communication, and genuine care for every pool we service.

features.title: Weekly Email Reports
features.description: After every service visit, you receive a detailed email with your pool's critical information and a typed inspection report.

features.title: State-Certified Technicians
features.description: Our techs hold State of Texas certifications and are trained to identify problems before they become costly repairs.

features.title: No Hidden Fees Ever
features.description: Competitive, transparent pricing with no surprise charges. We earn your trust with honest work, not fine print.

pricing.headline: Transparent, Affordable Pool Care
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no long-term contracts. Just honest pricing for honest work — tailored to your pool's specific needs.

guarantee.headline: Our Family Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you're ever unsatisfied with a service visit, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked. With an A+ BBB rating and zero complaints in over a decade, we stand behind every job. Your satisfaction isn't just a goal; it's a family commitment.

faqs.question: What's included in your weekly maintenance service?
faqs.answer: Every visit includes vacuuming, brushing walls and tiles, emptying skimmer baskets, water testing, chemical balancing, and a thorough inspection. You'll also receive a typed report and email update with your pool's critical information after each service.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our customers provide gate access and go about their day. You'll receive a detailed email report after every visit so you always know exactly what was done and the current state of your pool.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Frisco, Plano, Dallas, Allen, McKinney, Prosper, Richardson, Carrollton, and the surrounding DFW area. If you're in North Texas, give us a call — we likely cover your neighborhood.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. All of our pool technicians hold State of Texas certifications and are trained to identify and report both existing and potential problems before they become costly repairs.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: In most cases, we can begin service within the same week of your initial assessment. We'll work with your schedule to find the most convenient recurring day and time for visits.

testimonials.name: Long-term Customer
testimonials.text: A&C Pools has provided service for more than two years, always being courteous and exemplary. Our pool is clean and sparkling all the time.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: A&C Pools is a 5-star class A pool company with over-the-top personalized service. Our pool is always beautiful and we constantly receive compliments.

testimonials.name: Loyal Client
testimonials.text: They elevate pool maintenance above what others offer in consistency, reliability, professionalism and personal care. Excellent work and competitive pricing.

contact.headline: Let's Keep Your Pool Perfect
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free pool assessment today and see why Frisco families have trusted A&C Pools for over a decade.

footer.description: A&C Pools LLC is a family-owned pool service company proudly serving the North Texas community since 2015. BBB A+ rated with state-certified technicians.
footer.service_area: Frisco, Plano, Dallas, Allen, McKinney, Prosper, Richardson, Carrollton, and the surrounding DFW area
